vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of dormancy or total failure. The absence of visible foliage in P1, P2, and P4 suggests these specimens have been lost. P3 is the only site with an anchor, but it lacks visible plant matter.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plant life across the majority of the pots. The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only consistent landmark.
vision_report.narrative_description: As an expert visual ethologist, I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image stack. The biome is currently non-functional regarding the expected plant registry. The pots contain soil but lack visible, viable plant specimens. The white rabbit anchor in P3 remains the only constant. The environment appears to be a controlled, low-light setting, but the lack of biological activity suggests a systemic failure of the botanical collection.
